summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of PROP_MC Monte Carlo Simulator completed. All 19 test cases passed. App is fully functional with no critical issues.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working. App is a pure client-side Monte Carlo simulator with no backend. 22 firms with ~74 plans in firmDatabase.js. All data-testid attributes are properly implemented.

passed: App loads without errors at root URL, header 'PROP_MC Monte Carlo Simulator' visible
Firm grid shows 22 firms (23 cards including Custom)
Market filter pills (ALL/FUTURES/FOREX/CUSTOM) filter correctly
Selecting a firm card highlights it (green border) and reveals Step 2 plan grid
Selecting a plan reveals Step 3 strategy panel + results placeholder
Plan summary banner shows Capital, Target, DD, Fee, Split
Strategy defaults correct: WR=0.37, μ ganancia=438, σ ganancia=242, μ pérdida=-194, σ pérdida=28, P(spike)=0.0315, Mult spike=1.18
Clicking 'EJECUTAR SIMULACIÓN' shows loading state, then renders results-dashboard within ~3s
Results render 8 KPI cards, 3 chart panels, and stats row
Apex 50K Intraday sanity check: P(PASS)=23.05%, EV=+$427, P(Timeout)=66.83% (expected due to 30-day max)
FTMO 2-phase challenge: P(PASS)=2.44% (lower than single-phase), Phase 2 target=$2,500, 2-phase warning banner visible
Custom firm: All fields unlocked by default, capital/target editable, simulation runs correctly
MODIFIED badge appears when preset plan field is changed, disappears after reset
Apex warning '⏰ Cuenta Apex: 30 días' visible
Topstep warning 'ℹ️ Topstep no impone DLL' visible
Monthly-fee firms (Topstep, TPT, TradeDay, Leeloo, E2T) show '⚠️ Fee mensual' warning
2-phase firms show '🔄 Challenge de 2 fases' warning
Consistency vs_total warning visible for MFFU Core
DLL toggle shows DLL value field and DLL fatal toggle when ON
Consistency toggle shows type selector (vs_total/vs_target) when ON
Phases select reveals Phase 2 block with target/minDays/maxDays when set to 2
N simulations slider works (1000 sims: ~0.6s, 25000 sims: ~0.6s)
Reset-to-preset button restores original values
No dark-on-dark invisible text - all text readable against dark backgrounds
No console errors during full flow
